You are a professional LinkedIn content writer.

Write a LinkedIn post for the following user profile:

Role:{{58.role}}
Skills: {{58.skills}}
Topics of interest:{{58.topics}}

Rules:
- Professional and friendly tone
- 80–120 words
- role related emojis
-dont add emojis at starting
- 5 to 6 hashtags
- Clear, human-sounding content
-every time dont give same type of content.
Return the result in one paragraph only without line breaks.
Do not use quotation marks.

mapper.name: image_prompt
mapper.value:
Generate a LinkedIn carousel-style infographic post.

Topic: {{58.topics}}

role:{{58.role}}

Requirements:

* Create content suitable for an image-based LinkedIn post
* Use short bullet points
* Add headings and sections
* Make it visually structured like a poster
* Keep it concise and engaging
* Add emojis for sections
* Include a strong title at the top
* Add a conclusion or takeaway

Output format:

* Title
* Sections with bullet points
* Clear structure for image design

mapper.name: image_prompt
mapper.value:
Ultra-realistic 4K photorealistic professional photograph.

Subject:
A real {{58.role}} actively engaged in {{join(58.topics; ", ")}}.

Scene (choose a natural, real-world situation related to the topic):
• working collaboratively with teammates
• presenting insights on a screen or whiteboard
• focused solo work in a modern or casual environment
• discussing ideas in a meeting room or startup office
• remote work setup (home, café, co-working space)
• standing, walking, explaining, thinking — NOT posing

Environment:
Real-life environment that fits the topic:
• tech office, startup workspace, conference room
• home office, café, co-working space
• classroom, lab, brainstorming area
• outdoor corporate campus (if suitable)

Photography style:
• candid moment, unstaged
• DSLR photo, shallow depth of field
• natural human posture and expression
• realistic skin texture, real imperfections
• natural lighting (daylight / indoor mixed)
• no illustration, no CGI, no stock-photo look

Visual diversity rules (VERY IMPORTANT):
• DO NOT repeat the same scene as previous image
• DO NOT always show desk + laptop
• DO NOT always include coffee mug
• vary camera angle (side, over-the-shoulder, wide, close-up)
• vary lighting mood
• vary background and activity
• vary outfit style

Looks like a real photo taken today for LinkedIn — viral, authentic, professional.
